reviews.text:
I have lived with Student Cribs for two years now. While on the whole the house was of a high standard of furnishing there were some serious issues with maintenance. Numerous appliances broke repeatedly. When a surveyor came round he said there was over two days work that needed to be done (including checking drains, taking up floorboards and checking the boiler which has broken at least 4 times this year alone), yet nothing has been done so far. Apparently, we are living in one of the 'newer' houses which doesn't show.

Unfortunately, while the SC team may be lovely, there are some serious issues with the service. The house is really overpriced for the size it is and the location. The contract has clauses which are questionable and seem to leave you open to extra charges in the future. Rules like not being able to have photos on the wall, even with white tack which leaves no marks, reflects how out of touch they are with what students want from their rooms.

I would say that Student Cribs need to reassess how much their houses are worth, fix the faults with their maintenance contractors as it often takes too long for major jobs to be done. Also the process of viewings while you live there was an absolute nightmare. I received wrong viewing notifications which meant I often had the realtor knocking on my door in the morning when I hadn't even woken up. Serious work is needed to refine the 'services' that they provide and I think they would benefit from having a recent graduate and student who has live in their housing on their team to help them reassess their policies and practices.
Great response time to any problems in the house, very friendly and helpful.
The house is absolutely gorgeous and the staff were always ready to help us whenever they could!
Great house. Quick to address any problems we had, with them usually sending someone to the house the following day!

Facilities are awesome. They can be a pain to get in touch with, we've had a few issues regarding the house and had to wait days to get it sorted. Overall, they have handymen come out every few weeks to give the house a look over. Well worth it.

Spent two of my years at Exeter living in two different Student cribs houses - so nicely furnished and always people on hand to come and fix anything or sort out any problems pretty quickly ! Also makes life much easier having all your bills included and your tv / WiFi all set up for when you arrive !
Very quick and happy to sort out a problem and friendly customer service.

I used student cribs in my last year of uni and I have had no issues, items have broken during our time here but they have always been fixed and/or dealt with within 48 hours. I would recommend them to students

Very simple moving in and out process. Staff were always quick to respond to emails and try and fix any problems. The house was stylish and modern with great facilities. Wouldn’t change anything about my experience living in a student cribs house for my final year of uni.

I have loved living in a student cribs house for my last year of uni, the house was done to a great standard when we moved in. Although, my room has had some problems with condensation but hasn’t really effected my time living here. Adam and Garry have been great for when we have had a problems in the house such as dishwasher or washing machine has broke. They get things fixed within 48 if not 24 hours. Spending a bit more a month on accommodation is definitely worth it, when you are with students cribs.

Very professional student accommodation - have had a few issues this year (broken bed, broken shelves, multiple broken washing machine instances) and they have sorted these extremely quickly. Great communication with tenants and would recommend student cribs to anyone

Lived in Student Cribs properties for two years during uni. Very easy process to move in and out at the start of both years. Both were fairly new builds and any issues were sorted as soon as we'd let Student Cribs know. Overall would highly recommend!

Lived in a Student Cribs house my last year of university and really enjoyed it. The house was modern and the bathrooms were new. They were easy to get hold of if we had a problem and we had the security of going with a professional company so if anything wasn't working they could easily get it fixed. would definitely recommend than going with a private landlord who can be impossible to get hold of, as I experienced in my second year.
Student Cribs made our housing experience so easy, the house was FAB and the team were always on hand if we needed them or had any questions. Would highly recommend !!
Would highly recommend. Made our renting experience very easy!

Student Cribs were highly professional throughout our entire tennancy. The house was finished to an impeccable standard with high quality furnishings. The Student Cribs staff were always on hand if any problems arose. I would definitely recommend to any student looking for stylish yet reasonably priced accommodation.

Great experience with Student Cribs - they were very easy to deal with and the house was brilliant for the value - highly recommend! Definitely the easiest experience our house had with housing at University and the best quality by far.
very disappointed. An extremely frustrating company that charges the highest of prices! Wouldn't recommend to my worst enemy...

Would not recommend student cribs to anyone. They were my Landlord in Bristol and the service was substandard. The essentials did not work when the tenancy started and they were incredibly slow to fix may of these.
A lovely, warm house in a perfect location. All communications with the staff were quick and easy too.

Student cribs houses are modern and in great condition. I thoroughly enjoyed living in one of them while at uni, especially because the team were so friendly and always efficient in helping us with any problems we had! Would definitely recommend!!!!

I had such a lovely time living in my student cribs house. The customer service was impeccable; sorting things out straight away and being on the end of the phone whenever we needed them. Would definitely recommend to anyone wanting an easy and carefree student housing solution!!

I thoroughly enjoyed my time living in my Student Cribs house! It was absolutely beautiful and whenever I had a question, everyone in the office was available to help me and always really friendly! I would definitely recommend Student Cribs to anyone looking for a student house!!!

DO NOT USE STUDENT CRIBS. The management by Adam Solomon was completely incompetent, childish and vindictive throughout our tenancy. Student Cribs are a really nasty, bulling company who clearly do not care about the wellbeing of their tenants. When we arrived there was a lack of basic amenities such as heating, ovens and lighting which weren't fixed for months. Terrible handling of deposit. I highly advise anyone to find a different company.

NEVER USE THIS COMPANY!!!! Doesn't even deserve a star. This company at any chance will try and exploit you and and take your money. The management are greedy and will rob you of your deposit. We had to wait months for sufficient heating and WIFI which is unacceptable considering the prices they charge. There are much better letting agencies out there for students who will not try and gain money at any possible chance.  Use them at your own risk but I would stay well clear.

Hugely disappointed about my tenancy with Student Cribs.

Shocking customer treatment. Highly disorganised with numerous issues. Handling of deposit was shoddy. Completely overpriced for what you get.

Strongly advice against using them.

student cribs brought my accommodation while i was living there, they stole over half the deposit from me, they also lied and said my keys were missing after id left them in the room, so be carful when booking accommodation with this company
Brilliant year spent in a student cribs flat! Great amount of space, modern facilities and great location. I would definitely recommend this accommodation to any student living in Nottingham.
Always very professional, customer focused and will sort any issues you may have asap.
Well decorated houses that feel very homely and great communication and maintenance
The house we rented in Exeter was so great, and the people at the company were so helpful if ever we had a problem - would definitely recommend and use again.
Studen Cribs have been great- any issues we've had were fixed promptly and good communication. The house is lovely and modern, will miss it next year for sure!
Really enjoyed my experience with Student Cribs. The house was really nice and cosy, and the staff are super helpful! :)
I have had a really positive experience using Student Cribs. The house has been amazing and we have been very well looked after throughout our time using Student Cribs.

Our student cribs house was very comfy, bright, enjoyable whilst giving all 5 of us the space we need in order to study. The highlight of the house would definitely have to be the lounge (the couch was like a cloud) and the run through to the spacious kitchen. We had one problem with one of the showers however once reported student cribs was very quick to act upon it. Overall, the house was had a great environment and made second year very easy breezy
trash

Signed up but no verification email through?

My Facebook account also mysteriously 'liked' their page which I am sure I did not do.... Seems suspicious.

Fortunately, we are lucky enough to stay here in the coming academic year.

Talking about student cribs as an agent, their responses and actions are very fast and efficient! Everytime when we contact them by either phone or email, they pick up the case almost instantly and instruct us what to do patiently :)! I can say student cribs is really caring. They do NOT only concern about the money, but also the living experience. We are all girls do not know how to do the repairing things, and student cribs is always very likely to help. Coz I know some agents might ask tenants to solve all problems during their stay, but luckily this agent does not.

I'm so happy that I've found such an amazing house and agent. (*˘︶˘*).｡.:*♡

Rented from student cribs 2yrs in a row. The first year being better in regards to communication between us and the agency and any issues being resolved. As students and first time renters of a property, SC guided us through the whole experience from bills to bins. Was a decent experience - I have given the full 5 stars but inter communication was lacking by the 2nd year and a general lack of attention given to us a tenants who cared for the house and it's upkeep throughout our stay
Stayed here and it was an absolute dream, great people and the landlords will give you anything you need.

The accommodation is well over price I would suggest looking at other estate agents available! The handling of the deposits was truly awful took  over 2 months to receive it back. The company will over charge you for as much as they can, taking advantage of  knowing that we needed the deposits back we weren't able to appeal due the extra time it would have taken!
reviews.reply_text:
Hi Josh,

Thank you for taking the time to provide some feedback about Student Cribs, it always helps to learn from our tenant’s experiences. We are naturally disappointed that you were not happy, particularly in regards to deposits.

I’ve spoken to my colleague Rich who worked with you to get as much of your deposit back as possible. As you have been discussing with Rich, our deposit deductions are always evidence based and we have not overcharged for the damages caused to the property during your tenancy.

Since the deposit is a large sum of money we wanted to get it back to you as quickly as possible and as such we compromised on several charges to ensure they were acceptable to you and your housemates. A member of our team will be pleased to call you to explain the charges further if you would like more information.

Thanks, James

reviews.text: I lived in a Student Cribs house for 2 years and both the house and the service was fantastic. I'd highly recommend!

Student  Cribs have been amazing landlords! Our house was absolutely beautiful and definitely felt like a home, and whenever (very seldomly) we had a problem, maintenance was sent to us either that day or the very next day. Our deposit return was quick, efficient and very clear and we were all very sad to be leaving our lovely home! I would definitely recommend Student Cribs to all students looking for a house.
Great service from Brian! Made sure all of the issues were resolved to a high standard
marc wallas came to do a job and was very polite :)

I have lived with student cribs for the last 3 years in 2 different properties. The flats have been beautiful and they have been very helpful if anything has gone wrong. The portal is great and it is easy to get it contact with anyone if help is needed.

Propperty was decent however had a lot of difficulties with customer service when having issues with appliances. These were fixed but over a long period of time which was frustrating. However other then that the propperty was alright for the rent etc

Bryan and Wayne came to fix our fence today and they were fab. Really pleasant and they have fixed the fence really well. Massive thank you. It’s clear that they care a lot about their craft, and that was executed in their skill set.
wain was extremely friendly and helpful and efficient.
Wayne was very helpful and informative with our issue regarding a leak from the flat above. Great customer service. He quickly and professionally helped to resolve the issue.
Just had Wain come and fix my door, did a great job and was lovely to talk to. 10/10
Brian and Wayne were very friendly and consistently kept us up to date with timings. No complaints on their service!

Slow response time when encountering complaints. Find a private landlord, do not rent from student cribs. Wifi issues from the beginning, had rats in the house (very clean tidy house, not our fault. Underground pipes. Student cribs did nothing, but external contracter was lovely, put some mesh wiring over the rat hole. So whoever lives here next year, you can have a rat viewing area in the kitchen), had power die and no lights for 2 weeks.  Things get sorted, eventually, but for the price you pay, you are better off living elsewhere. Not worth the student package "convenience".

Update: After some legal back and forth, we got compensation for £200. Could have pushed for more, but as a overworked students we gave in.
Fire alarm test
Brian M was wonderful with helping with maintenance. He came quickly and helped with more issues than were reported! Lovely man and did an amazing job.
Steve H has been excellent in the maintenance of our household. He is an extremely sound gentleman and outstanding at his job. Would highly recommend the use of his services.
Steve H has been great. If we have needed anything he’s been right there for us in a quick and professional manner.
Steve H has done a fabulous job in assisting our house. Quality service and such a positive kind attitude. So grateful for Steve H, amazing work
Steven H. Great job doing the PAT tests
Brian M came round to fix lots in our house. Was a very speedy and well done process. Thanks!
Had mouldy bathroom, was sorted out by Brian M , really good job

Have been extremely disappointed with Student Cribs, especially given how expensive their rent is. Our house was not in the best condition when we moved in, clearly lots of issues that weren’t reported by the previous tenants. First of all we were left without any hot water for 10 days, a week after moving in with absolutely no care in the world about the issues this may cause for us. Then as the winter came the holes in our back door sucked all of the warmth out of our house and lead to severe, unmanageable condensation, and they STILL haven’t replaced the door like they said they would 7 months after we reported it. Had issues with appliances and countless cancelled maintenance appointments, even some that carried on from the previous tenancy! Funnily enough, anything like fire detector testing that is legally required is done quickly, although even those were broken for about a month, but everything else is either ignored or takes months. They also leave our front door unlocked whenever they do come around, even though they have to use a key to get in- not very safe! To top it off, the day after we moved in one of the maintenance guys recorded us unlocking our front door while sat in an unmarked van which scared the living daylights out of us. Reported it to the police and head office who both dealt with it very well, but to this day I do not know why he couldn’t have got out of his van to speak to us if he was concerned we were struggling, REALLY NOT a nice introduction to living in a new area, struggled to sleep at night after that. Basically, if you have any issues they won’t be sorted in a professional way, better off paying less rent with a better landlord!
Mark Wallace, Super polite, friendly and efficient !!
Marc Wallace has done a brilliant job of fixing the blinds in the main room.
Mark Wallace was quick and polite solved the issue and took the rubbish with him thank you

Mark Wallace is brilliant he came round to fix some issues in our house which he done with speed. He was constantly polite throughout the whole interaction and done some real quality work. Would love for him to come sort out any and all issues in the future!!!
Steve H was really helpful and friendly in fixing our washing machine while he was round to do the fire alarm tests
great experience with Steve H doing our fire alarm test. Very friendly
Steve H did a wonderful job with PAT testing our equipment and was very friendly, was quick and efficient and was lovely to talk to!
Steve H was a nice guy, great service
Steven H did appliances testing, was really friendly and efficient
Lovely work from Steven H done great job and dead friendly

We had Mark Wallace  sort out our microwave for us, he was super speedy with replacing it and really polite!

Also had our Appliance tests done by Steven Hudspith, really really friendly guy who managed to help us figure out a couple extra problems we had with our oven that had not been reported by us!
marc wallace maintenance friendly and great work

Mark Wallace was extremely helpful for our various maintenance issues, he was very kind and made sure to ask us any problems he didn’t know of and informed us of everything he was doing to improve these issues.
Mark Wallace, very polite and helpful, assisted with all of the maintenance issues we had, very satisfied
Had Steven H come out and clean up a mould issue that was fixed

We have had a few issues at our property, but Marc Wallace has been an absolute star helping me and my housemates with them. He’s ensured every single problem has been dealt with and dealt with well and had such professionalism doing it too. I hope to see him again for future maintenance in our property. He’s well and truly made our house feel like a home again.

Marc Wallace is an absolute godsend. He’s been doing maintenance in our property over the last week and to say that he has smashed it is an utter understatement. Not only is he extremely pleasant and chatty which is exactly what you want from maintenance, he knows exactly what he needs to do and executes it to a extremely high standard. Marc well and truly is a credit to this company

Marc Wallace has been an incredible maintenance man for our property. From previously having a maintenance team that came in and made a mess of our house, he has been a breath of fresh hair. Taking out an entire day to come and properly fix all of the issues we have been passion on to Student Cribs for months was going above and beyond the expectations. The absolute highest praises for him specifically.
Steven hudspith did a great job and fixed the front door!
Mark Wallace came promptly and fixed our issue in minimal time with no bother at all.
While resealing under the sink and toilet in my bathroom, Mark Wallace was friendly, professional and completed the work efficiently!! Thanks
Mark Wallace fixed my lock, very quick and efficient and was very helpful
Mark Wallace came to our flat to fix a broken lock and was very friendly and fixed the lock quickly, was also keen to help with other issues around the flat.
Mark Wallace: he was very nice and helpful, sorted the problem out and is getting it fixed
My door was jammed and Mark Wallace came first thing and fixed it very quickly.
Mark Wallace was very friendly & had superb service

Mark Wallis
Great job on radiator

Marc Wallace was very informative and addressed the 3 issues we reported quickly and efficiently. After he completed the issues he came back down to alert us on what the next steps would be. He also assured us that he would come back to sort out any further issues.

Great experience with Mark Wallace, reported three issues and all were solved within one day. He came to speak to us at the end to follow up what the next steps were as well. Positive experience all round :)
Marc Wallace was amazing sorted the mould issue and was just amazing all sorted
Mark Wallace - manage to fix my door within a couple of minutes. Really friendly, also was able to organise other jobs round the house.
Mark Wallis, was great and efficient in came  fixing the boiler
Marc Wallace was a delightful man. So helpful and polite. Thank you Marc!
Marc Wallace has always done a fab job,  always goes above and beyond. Super friendly and such a great help.
Marc (Wallace) is so fab. He is always helpful and has always explained what he is doing. He is an absolute credit to your team.
Our house is great, but student cribs can take a very long time to get on top of jobs we’ve needed doing.
Mark walllace was very nice and helpful
Marc Wallace - very happy with all the work he did
Marc Wallace
I’ve had a great experience with Student Cribs Newcastle. Mark Wallace was especially helpful- he came and fixed all the issues in the flat quickly, professionally and with no hassle.
Marc Wallace was really helpful and fixed the problem well and quickly!
Came to the flat to fix the sink and did it all very fast and even cleaned the sink for us after!
Mark Wallace was brilliant in replacing taps in our house and fixing an issue with hot water!
Mark Wallace
Marc Wallace, came and did the job requested along with doing all extra jobs I needed doing, got it done super quick and was super polite.
Marc Wallace was our maintenance guy and he made sure everything was completed and helped us ensure other issues were highlighted.

Marc Wallace was fantastic- came to paint one wall noticed the how dark the front room was and that previously the correct paint wasn’t quite right so offered to get this sorted for us which he didn’t need to do. Marc was super friendly and went the extra mile to make our student house a nicer place to be which we found really kind as often this is neglected with being uni students.
Our maintaince man Marc Wallace was amazing came round and fixed all of our issues
Nathan miller came to check out fire alarm and left doing other odd jobs, so helpful and friendly
did a mint job, came for a fire test and left having fitted us 2 shelves. Thank you!!
Friendly and helpful!!!!

Came over and helped us fix our lock on the door.
Installed an entirely new lock and was very polite and efficient
Also helped us by reporting an issue with our washer
Absolutely no complaints 👍
Mark Wallace was very friendly and helpful and had our issue fixed very quickly
Mark wallace came and helped us as we were missing a few things in the flat when we moved in and he was very helpful and did everything for us perfectly.
Honestly, best student accommodation; maintenance is quick, which we never really need; shows how lovely the houses are really :)
Really easy to have the keys dropped off, great communication with student cribs, overall 10/10 (flat was in amazing condition, really clean)
The whole process form viewing to moving in was great. Even if there was a small snag, the team were very good at communicating and resolving the issue. Maintenance team are friendly and responsive.
Great experience over my 2 years living with Student Cribs, would highly recommend!
I had a leak in my room and it was fixed quickly, then mario a painter came and did great job and at a good speed then left it as tidy if not tidier then it was before

Just had Steve Pritchard in the flat today, regarding a leak, he promptly assessed the issues.
Steve is polite, sociable and good at what he does.
Really easy and simple for students. Very helpful throughout the year. Would recommend.
Helpful and easy to get a house with, maintenance and fixing jobs all done within the next few days if not that day - very easy communication with the company throughout contract.
Responsive, easy to deal with, would recommend

Very good support and issue solving department. But constant emails and viewing with last minute cancellation impacts our general day to day operations in the house until the property was rented for next year
Efficient staff however there were still issues with the property on move in day
Very organised and kind workers. Lovely place to live very helpful company
We booked on to stay an extra year in here we love the flat and location that much, the staff that come round to do their maintenance checks are all sound
Amazing place to live and well worth the price, anything that needs looking at gets checked quicker than ever
I’ve really enjoyed my experience with student cribs! Highly recommend!
Quick to resolve issues, simple to sort and pick up keys
Very hospitable and friendly staff who are always willing to help with any queries we have regarding our property
Responds to complaints and fixes needed in the house quickly. Straight forward website.
Any issues with the house are resolved quickly
House is very clean and decorated well for when you move in. Any issues are resolved very quickly aswell when you submit through the portal.

Just an honest review-
House is nice, but there’s some things that are issues..
We viewed the property several times as we were unsure about the property and the lack of space as there was only one not so big fridge freezer for a house of six. We were promised by the person doing the viewing that we could actually request another one and they would be happy to do this. Well we paid, moved in and all the rest of it, requested one several times and have refused to pointblank. Even their own staff visiting the property have said they think us having only one is unsuitable. There’s only 3 of us living here and it’s jammed full (yet they say you must de-thaw it, which will be impossible with a jammed freezer). The rest of the group who move in are going to have nowhere to put anything and we are really disappointed for this misleading information in a bid to make us book the property.
This is just a bit general, the rooms are lovely but the grey in the rooms makes it kind of dull, I think it would be nicer if it was a different colour because you kinda need the lights on or it looks quite dark.
Maintenance are fast to respond and very friendly generally.
House is in a good location.
Moving in day could have went smoother it was stressful to find out what to do.
Other properties had better facilities for the same price or even less in cost, which I found quite confusing. When you calculate how much they make in total from the property you’d assume they would at least want to make the facilities match it, it’s quite upsetting.
If you asked if I would stay with student cribs next year, I don’t think I would say yes unless they actually made changes that they promised.

EDIT - I forgot to add this but the WiFi connection is horrendous, like it’s so poor it disconnects you all the time and even the TVs wifi doesn’t work. I have been on 4G constantly for ages. I also tried to put the heating on once and the radiators didn’t even feel like they were warming up much, confused about that
reviews.reply_text:
Hi Kaira,

Thank you for choosing to live with us this year, and for taking the time to leave your feedback. We are glad that you like your house and that you have had positive experiences with our Maintenance Team, but we are sorry that parts of your experience so far have fallen below expectations.

We understand that you are in touch with your Property Manager and a visit is scheduled today to install a mesh WIFI booster and to look at your fridge / freezer facilities.

If you do have further feedback or queries please do continue to speak to your Property Manager, or you can call our office on: 0203 758 7000

Thanks,
The Student Cribs Team

reviews.text:
Avoid at all costs. They owed us a one month rent re-fund and it took over 2 months to receive the money. We emailed them over and over and called them countless times over the two months only to be told every time that the money would be sent next day and we would receive a call back. This never happened!

Find a different letting agent. They will make it as difficult as possible to receive money they owe you to the point where it is evident they are holding onto funds for as long as possible for their own benefit.
reviews.reply_text: Hello Harry, sorry to see your feedback. Our customer service teams have been unprecedently busy these past few months and despite increasing the size of our team, some calls are still missed, which we are very sorry for. I understand that the funds have since been returned. If you do have further feedback please do not hesitate to contact our Newcastle office: 0191 580 5798

Love how modern this flat is, perfect for a student
Nice place 👌 👍

I lived at Morrison Circus for almost two years and I have to bump my three star review to a five star one purely because of Marc from maintenance.

Marc always went above and beyond for us, resolving any issues efficiently and well. We experienced various issues during our stay, but Marc always ensured we were up to date and reassured as to how and when any issues would be fixed.

He truly carries the whole company on his shoulders and having a reliable and skilled maintenance professional at our disposal if and when needed made our stay worth it!

Hopefully Marc sees this review and knows how appreciated he is. Student cribs would crumble without him!
Really good flats, very modern. The rooms are  a good size staff are all friendly. Maintenance man is always on top of jobs and happy to help. Would recommend.

Shared a flat for roughly 2 years in Edinburgh. For what you get it's a little on the pricey side. The furnishings (other than the bed) aren't the comfiest and there were a few things which took over a year to fix which caused other issues like mould. The maintenance guy is really kind and tries his best but it's a lot of flats to fix for just one guy. I think the biggest problem is with upper management. They do respond but I feel like they don't often understand the severity, often placing blame on the maintenance guy instead of taking some responsibility. The experience is definitely dependent on your flatmates (I had a mixture of good and bad) and the neighbours (also varied from year to year). Wifi is also often reliable and if there are issues they get solved fairly quickly and are usually caused by bad weather so they aren't a random occurrence. Overall, it's a good experience but lower your expectations a bit. I feel like I've heard worse stories out there in regard to student accommodation and I believe I would have preferred this experience more than halls if I had stayed in them from what I've heard.

It's a really homely environment, with helpful landlords. I would 100% reccomend, especially for students as there is such a wide range of people our age. As bills are included, it makes for a very easy, and warm stay x
Great spot in the city. Amazing landlord
Very helpful friendly staff, have always been very quick with responding to any problems. The flats feel really clean and modern.
I have been enjoying living with student cribs so far. Quickly response to problems, nice flats, perfect location, job opportunities and so much more.
Fantastic flat for those who are starting second year.
The accommodation is great for students and the staff are friendly. If you need any maintenance they always get on it quickly.

Student Cribs is awful they repair nothing without constant chasing up they forgot to pay our utilities included in our rent and it's been over a month and they still haven't resolved it and it's been over a months since we reported it and we get debt collector letters. It's awful.
reviews.reply_text:
Hi James,

Thank you for your feedback.

I understand that you have received an update on this situation from one of our Directors in Friday 7th January, but I would like to reiterate that we are really disappointed that this has happened. We would like to confirm to you that we are in communication with them to resolve this error as soon as possible, and we are doing everything that we can to make sure that this is stopped and does not continue.

I am sorry for any distress this may have caused you. Please be reassured that Student Cribs have paid (and will continue to pay) your energy provider.

Thanks,
The Student Cribs Team

reviews.text: lovely flats
Really poor service here. You have to chase to get anything sorted and even then nothing happens. Avoid

Absolutely shocking. Don't be fooled by their not so low prices or location in the city. Student Cribs is 1/10 communication with tenants. 1/10 maintenance. 1/10 customer support.
Firstly, three of my flat mates and I all paid £350, each, for parking permits before moving and were promised the spaces upon arrival. It has been over two months and of course we haven't yet received these. We have tried to contact student cribs about this on several occasions. All end in false promises. "You're parking bollards will be installed by next week" is a popular one.
We reported our hot water tap as broken and it took four weeks for it to be resolved.
The internet is terrible constantly cutting out, capped at 16mbps unless you buy a package, ping always spiking. The internet was down for a full day at one point. (Bearing in mind university classes are online at this moment and a good signal is vital). All we were told was. "Sorry for the inconvenience".

If I could I would rate student cribs 0/5. Please do not rent a flat with this company. I will certainly not be living with them for another year.

reviews.text:
I wish i could leave zero. Avoid at all costs.
0ur experience with student cribs has been nothing but terrible with so many problems its easier just to bullet point them:

-Student cribs did not inform us that the property wasn't ready to be moved into until 2 days before the actual move in date.

-Put us in temporary accommodation that was no way up to part as what was promised to us.

-On moving into this temporary accommodation, there was 89 people waiting outside with their families for hours in the rain not known if they could be housed that day. Remembering that these people had travelled from all over the country during a pandemic for the move in date outlined in our contracts.

-Left us with no wifi for 5-6 weeks including the period in which we all had to self-isolate and do uni work as all learning was moved online. This was very detrimental to our mental health and we struggled to keep in contact with family and friends (our phone bills were through the roof) they also did not check in with us during this period known full well that we had tested positive for corona virus.

-Repeatedly ignored our our emails and phone calls regarding all of these problems and questions about our move in dates. They also ignored calls and emails from the owner of the temporary accommodation.

Once moved into the property that was 'newly refurbished'

there was also countless problems:

-No locks on bathroom doors/ doors not fully closing
-Broken furniture
-Broken TVs in rooms- which is still not fixed
-Leaking radiator which lead to big wet patch in one room and took several days to respond to the issue
-Porch door that does not close due to poor paint finishes
-Leaking showers/ poor drainage
-loose radiator
-broken dishwasher
-loose desks that haven't been fitted properly

-Student cribs have not paid our gas and electric bills which lead to bailiffs turning up to our door this morning (bills still have not be paid) Kay and Steven the Newcastle managers did not answer their phones during this traumatic experience.

-In addition, they held viewings during lockdown/ spammed our emails with viewings that never turned up

-They promised us refunds which was clearly a lie as we have received no such money. This was clearly an attempt from them to stop us from complaining and emailing.

-They requested us to do a walk around video of the house in exchange for £100. which we have never received but they have posed on their YouTube accounts

DO NOT RENT FROM THIS COMPANY

many people in Newcastle have also had very similar experiences!!!

(Translated by Google) Still decent for students, even if the smell of garbage is never far away ☺

(Original)
Reste correct pour les étudiants même si l'odeur des poubelles n'est jamais très loin ☺

reviews.text: Make renting easy

I recently awarded this place a 5 star on account of the quick response, however that was soon forgotten. Out extractor fan has been broke since November with the repair constantly delayed, it was meant to be December, then January and then last week but still no fix. Alongside this we went days without any running water and currrently we are without any hot water which will not be fixed till Monday. If any issue occurs on a weekend it’s like student cribs vanish, they do not care till Monday when they need to. I would understand due to the small staff and high work load but id argue running water and hot water are key issues. Furthermore, the fire alarm goes off in a routine fashion every few weeks because they are set to such a low requirement of heat to set them off, which for safety I would understand but on a Friday night when it goes off for over an hour it’s painful. The building is nice and the portal is an accessible space but aside from that it’s not value for money. Finally, a last issue would be the bins it essentially looks like a waste dump out the back because there is about 4 bins for all the flat and therefore rubbish is scattered everywhere. To make this worse they are currently refurbishing a studio, but all the wooden desks and counters and their subsequent nails are all over the car park so they can’t even blame the students.

reviews.text: Beautiful and fab location

Definitely avoid this place if you’re a student looking for accommodation. Lived here for a year and have nothing good to say about it.

The other two 5 star reviews of this property are from the property managers which really shows a lot about the staff here.
They put a lot of energy in ensuring you sign the contract (including lying when showing you around) to ensure they get your money, then after that they do the absolute bare minimum for you.
All the appliances that are included are cheap, the oven hardly cooks your food, the TV is cheap and hardly ever works, the internet goes off on an almost daily basis.

The rooms aren’t designed very well. Basic appliances aren’t included. They use a saniflow toilet system which definitely shouldn’t be used in accommodation. The toilet never flushed properly and you can constantly hear the shredder going off when there’s any running water. The room also often smells due to the shredder actually being in there.

The radiator is a “smart radiator” which means that it only turns on when motion is detected. It gets extremely cold during winter as you can’t have the radiator on if you’re in bed or if you’re out, you’ll often find yourself coming back or waking up in a freezing cold room and not being able to do much to heat up since it takes so long and you constantly have to be setting the sensors off to ensure it stays on.

The bathroom lights are also “smart” and turn on and off when motion is detected, they take a long time to turn off after not detecting motion so if you need to go in the bathroom during the night you will be kept awake a while waiting for the lights to turn off.
The appliances that are put in the rooms all seem to be made for offices or places that generally aren’t lived in. It just seems like they’re included in here to save money but it ends up making this not a nice place to live.

The fire alarm is connected to every room in the building; so if there’s smoke detected in any room or if the alarm is faulty it will go off in every room. On average the fire alarm goes off about 5 times a week and stays on for 30 mins at least. The majority of the time this is late at night or early in the morning. When the alarm goes off someone has to ring a staff member and they have to drive out to disable it, this usually takes a while and it’s an issue that the staff aren’t doing anything to resolve.

There’s no soundproofing through the building, you can hear everything from inside your room and everyone can hear you from outside your room. From the bottom floor you can hear people walking around on the floors above you.

There is constantly people coming in and out of your room to “make sure it’s kept clean” the cleaner will ask to come in every Saturday morning and if you decline someone from the office will come uninvited to investigate why. You can’t raise issues with staff as they  just try to argue with you and don’t help resolve the issue in any way.

The exterior doors are left open 24/7 which means that literally anyone can walk in. They also give visitors (such as contractors) full access to all the rooms and don’t escort them during visits to your room so you might want to invest in a safe if you’re going to live here just in case.

The rooms aren’t worth even close to the amount they are renting them for. Also the parking permit doesn’t guarantee you a spot as a lot of the time the car park is full even if you have a permit.

Very poor management experience.
There is no reliable system for basic services that should be standard. Monthly electricity meter readings are not provided unless repeatedly chased. There is also no secure parcel system, which makes it extremely difficult to receive deliveries—items have been missed or lost.
More concerning is the lack of support in urgent situations. There is no accessible contact for emergencies (e.g. being locked out), and issues such as fire alarms have occurred without proper communication or follow-up. In addition, the garage door is frequently not functioning.
The level of management does not meet reasonable expectations. This is particularly disappointing compared to previous management, which provided significantly better support and organisation.

I would not recommend properties managed under Student Crib.

The Student Cribs Team

reviews.text: I’ve had a good experience in Student Cribs so far! The crib is well maintained and upon moving in was to a good standard, and staff are friendly. I’ve had a couple issues with getting admin issues resolved but the staff have tried their best to do what they can.

Worst student letting company.
Takes months to fix basic problems.
Does not clear mould before entering flat.
Leaves furniture broken.
Windows broken.
Overall terrible.

Also extremely overpriced for a single room.

Staff contradictory, administrative errors, inaccurate advice and repeated miscommunication causing unnecessary stress!

My situation was already stressful, but Student Cribs did not alleviate any stress or help when they definitely could have.

The accounts team gave me completely false information, telling me I didn’t have to pay rent for two months; something that was later rectified by a senior manager because it wasn’t even possible. After that, I was suddenly told I had 48 hours to pay a large amount and, when I asked for clarification, was told “it doesn’t really matter.”

They sent me the procedure to releasing from a group contract as opposed to a individual contract to which I had found out myself. As I was not required to sign another tenancy for another replacement tenant I assumed I was released from the tenacy.

Student cribs did not notify me when a replacement tenant was archived, instead blamed me for not knowing when all I had was an email from “Claudia Terry” with no subject and a link asking me to fill bank details with no obvious association to student cribs nearly anyone would have thought was a scam.

Two different staff members quoted me different holding deposit amounts, the payment system failed repeatedly, and my replacement tenant’s forms were delayed for over a week. I was also told I couldn’t get a replacement until I’d cleared arrears which again, completely untrue.

All of this happened while I was paying double rent as a student with no financial support. Every mistake, delay, and mixed message from Student Cribs caused more emotional and financial stress that could have been completely avoided if their staff communicated properly or followed their own procedures.

I have no confidence in Student Cribs after this event, although the initial issue was not necessarily their fault (nor mine) these administrative mistakes and staff contradictories which followed caused me serious financial and emotional stress, and could have been alleviated at multiple points which I am convinced could have made eme aware I was still legally in the contract in the first place, and got my replacement tenant in quicker. In both cases saving me and my family the constant misinformation and struggle.
Good
perfect
Very smooth
Decent experience. Thanks :)

Very quick and easy check in. Collected keys with no problem at all, was greeted by friendly faces at the property when moving in and offered sweets and refreshments too. Right to rent problem was sorted with no issue at all. Would definitely recommended.

I’ve only recently properly moved into my flat and the process was really easy. The people online were amazing to talk to. The only other thing that I would say was a downfall was the condition of my flat when I moved in it was not cleaned properly at all, but I called about it and it got sorted so the handling was great

Great service, speedy response to any complaints/maintenance. Lovely maintenance guys (Mike and Mike). Probably only fault would be making sure it’s clean before we move in, maybe some fresh paint, deep cleaning the sofas and back garden - toaster & kettle we had to use was in the basement on arrival covered in cobwebs and smelled but honestly very liveable and satisfied with my experience !! Good student house :)
Incredibly unhelpful when trying to sort a payment plan for a student and they won’t let us call them or speak to anyone.

Worst housing company ever, overpriced rent for a run down property. Had occasions of slugs and white mould in multiple rooms due to them not insulating the house and all student cribs did was come and WIPE it, not to mention our boiler breaking in winter and student cribs not fixing it for 7 days..  overall they take advantage of university students and home them in unlivable properties and conditions.
Mike always fixes all our issues efficiently is extremely helpful and always friendly!
Mike H is brilliant at fixing all of our reported issues, not only quickly but to a high standard. Mike is so friendly and always very chatty which is lovely ❤️
Mike is super helpful and friendly. No problem is ever too big - really appreciate all the help, thank you - Ben+ Missy
Didn’t turn up to any house viewings , which had been booked weeks in advance ! Was rather idealistic

I am extremely disappointed with my experience with Student Cribs. The property I was provided was in a completely uninhabitable condition. There was mold, damp, stained walls, damaged furniture, and broken blinds. The property was filthy and not as advertised.

Despite reporting these issues immediately, I received no meaningful assistance. I called multiple times, visited the Manchester office in person, and was consistently met with dismissive and condescending comments. We were told to find someone else to take over the tenancy, which is absurd considering the state of the property.

Despite raising serious health concerns, the staff dismissed them, showing a blatant disregard for tenant safety. Even worse, they expect us to find a replacement tenant to terminate the contract, knowing full well the deplorable state of the property. This shows a complete lack of morals. How can they expect anyone to live there?

This entire situation has been incredibly stressful, and we’ve had to spend additional money on storage and hotel stays because we cannot live in the property. I am appalled by the lack of urgency and the poor customer service. We are now left without a place to live and out of pocket. I wouldn’t recommend Student Cribs to anyone.
reviews.reply_text:
Dear Amira,
 
We are sorry to see your review.
 
We understand that you have been in contact with our Regional Portfolio Manager and Senior Customer Experience Manager and whilst we feel that the issues following the tenancy start date were largely cosmetic (and were subsequently resolved), we completely understand how it would have impacted your experience with us. We are pleased that you are in your Crib and are hopeful that the remainder of your time with us is a positive one.
 
Have a lovely week ahead.
 
Thanks,
The Student Cribs Team

reviews.text: Great company if you want a damp, damaged, expensive and dangerous basement. Student’s health and wellbeing is obviously low down on the priority list.
reviews.reply_text:
Dear Andy,
 
We are sorry to see your review. We have a Maintenance Operative attending the property tomorrow to treat the condensation build up and attend to the furniture & appliance jobs. 

The Portfolio Manager will be attending the property in the next 48 hours to inspect the property (with a view to catching up with the tenants in person).
 
Our tenants wellbeing and enjoyment of their property are extremely important to us. We hope that by addressing and resolving these issues promptly, it will enhance your confidence in the level of service we aim to provide all of our tenants.
 
A member of the customer experience team will be giving you a call in the next 24 hours, but if you would like to discuss any further in the meantime, please give us a ring on 0203 758 7000.
 
Thank you,
The Student Cribs Team

reviews.text: All round good experience

The house was good and the maintenance were proactive and really friendly. There were small issues, the wifi was slightly iffy at times and there were a few bits that were a bit broken but on the whole it was a positive experience, a good house and nothing like the nightmares you hear of terrible student landlords.
The best student letting agency
Any issues are sorted really quickly
Maintenance are so fast at fixing problems and really look after us
Good

Give like 0 flexibility when it comes to payments making me pay 2k for rent in July when she house isn’t even available till a later date. Asked to allign payments with student finance they refused saying no keys will be handed out. Real piece of works these guys I recommend going elsewhere
Simple and easy process however when moving into the property it wasn’t cleaned to a high standard

Straight forward process, however house wasn’t cleaned very well but once speaking to a staff member they were quick to resolve this matter and booked for a cleaner to come
clean the areas needed :)

Really good for second years who are worried about landlords being bad. Student cribs sorted anything broken within a few days of putting it on the portal. A few things were bad like the overall build of the house was dodgy, the attic room floor (above my room) was so loud to walk across but I got use to it.
Have no complaints, always quick to see to reported issues.
Super helpful staff, fix issues straight away cant complain
It has been lovely living in our house and the  maintenance team do a very good job.
Good house, great help on issues and maintenance!

No problems with rent payments and any problems we report in the portal are dealt with straight away. House in a really good condition when we moved in and only maintenance issues have been tackled quickly by a friendly team.

Avoid at all costs. Poor maintenance that took ages to sort anything, the house hadn't even been cleaned before arrival, I found receipts from years ago under the bed. However, the worst thing by far was the fact that me and my flatmates signed an agreement to leave the house early in exchange for a rent refund. They haven't payed us back weeks after we left, and I am still chasing my money now. I feel as though I have been taken advantage of.
reviews.reply_text:
Hello Zaynah,

Thank you for taking the time to feedback. We are sorry to see that parts of your tenancy fell below expectations.

We understand you have now received the payment – we do apologize that this took longer to arrive than we had hoped.

If you do have further feedback, please do reach out on: 020 3758 7000

Thanks,
The Student Cribs Team
Hi Phoebe, thank you for your feedback! The Student Cribs Team.
Hi Phebe, we are so happy to see you are happy with your Crib! Thank you for your review. The Student Cribs Team.

reviews.text: Dreadful company. Does not care about the issues it causes for tennants. Faults not fixed for months and the inventory was not included upon arrival so missing items that are ignored no matter how many times it gets reported.  Never rent with them it leads to more problems and stress for the students in the property. If you are happy for them to make massive mistakes then go ahead but if it means you'd rather eat than wait for them to fix their mistakes with rent then DO NOT rent through student cribs. Absolutely stunned by how poor of a service they offer for what you have to pay.
reviews.reply_text:
Hello Eleanor,

We are sorry to see your review. We understand that you have spoken with our Finance Team who have explained that the cause of the issue you faced is making manual rental payment when a direct debit was already set up. As discussed if you wish to switch to manual rental payments we do need some notice to cancel your direct debit – we have now done this and a refund is being processed.

If you do have any further queries around this please do reach out and a member of our Finance Team will be happy to chat: 0203 758 7000

Thanks,

The Student Cribs Team

reviews.text: Peace and quiet

My experience living here was mixed. The staff on site were friendly and the maintenance team were always helpful. However, the accommodation quality did not match the price in my view.

When I moved out, my housemate and I, as well as several friends in another apartment, were informed that our deposits would not be returned. This was surprising given that we completed a full inventory at check-in. The reasons provided for the deductions did not align with our own records.

This year was also the first time a specific figure was applied to the ‘fair use’ utilities policy. As a result, a number of tenants were charged additional amounts for utilities that had previously been included in the rent. In our case, we were told our electric and water usage over an eleven-month period exceeded £2,200, which did not reflect our understanding of typical consumption. When I asked for evidence, this was not provided.

If you like the accommodation, it may still suit you. I would just recommend being prepared for potential end-of-tenancy charges for deposits and utilities, and keeping detailed records throughout your stay.

Moved here in July. Its been over 2 months and I still have no working shower, a wasp nest that still has not been removed. Im now being ignored by the management team etc and I’m expected to pay another £2k+ instalment. This company has been nothing but a major disappointment and I would strongly consider other student housing options.

Edit: Shower now finally fixed.

Move in date: (28/07/2025)
Shower fixed date: (25/10/2025)

I still think this is a long time to wait.
Over priced and not well maintained. Good location but that’s about it.

Awful experience with maintenance team and dealing with a broken shower. Not sure if the maintenance for Mezzino and Student Cribs are the same, as I’m aware they changed hands during my tenancy, but it’s beside the point. My shower has been broken since November. After about five attempts of trying to fix it (without testing if it worked before they left, evidently), they ended up closing all my maintenance request tickets. Whenever I rang them, they’d tell me United Utilities would come and sort it, but nobody arrived! I move out in less than 24 hours and I can assure you the shower still runs freezing cold. Sent three copies of my complaints in the last few months and not one of them has seen a response. I struggle with OCD and it makes taking baths really hard for me- I’m lucky my hometown isn’t far from here, or I’d have no idea what to do. I find it to be really unfair, especially considering I have clarified my issues on many, many occasions.

An absolute dive about as water tight as a colander, and in trying to dispute 300£ out of 7,500£ of the extortionate rent which has been raised, studen cribs will threaten their tenants with court orders until they extract every penny, avoid

Finally managed to move out of this hole. First it was a leaky roof that was like a tap that meant I couldn’t live in the room without getting ill from the damp. Then as a cherry on the cake at 9am on the last day of our tenancy came in to find 5 people clearing out the whole apartment with all our stuff in bin bags, then to be told if we were an hour later our hundreds of pounds of stuff wouldve been thrown in the bin. This was after calling and telling them the situation and them saying that it was fine and they wouldn’t do our apartment yet.
Great space

Maintenance took ages to fix a bathroom door and bedroom doors to the point where I had to fix it myself. I loved living here compared to my previous accommodation but I had to leave here due to the high cost of rent and electricity. No locks on bedroom doors. Staff were helpful and wonderful but it was the maintenance that was the problem. I do not blame the staff in any way. I know there were management changes and I hear now they are improving things.

The worst accommodation I have ever lived in during my four years at university.
Move in was awful, we were informed only the night before that the toilet WAS NOT BUILT, issues with furniture, and the list was endless. We had to move in to the fourth floor with NO LIFT. Toilet took MONTHS to be built causing me to live out of the kitchen due to maintenance having to come every day for months. Communication was awful, I don’t think I ever sent an email and got a response to it without begging. I was once locked out of the flat ( as they disabled everyone’s access keys as they ‘forgot’ to renew them ) and did not get a response for 6 hours after calling emergency number and management probably 60+ times, with fear of not having anywhere to stay at night . They never knew how to solve our problems. I remember getting a ‘there’s nothing we can do about it’ after finding a mouse in my clean flat due to holes in the wall, they came to fix it and promised everything is fixed just for us to find the mouse again with more holes in the walls that were not covered.
Management was always rude and unhelpful. We stayed patient for so long and when we went to finally communicate our frustration we never even got an apology.
Overall had a horrible toll on my mental health as an international student doing my Master’s with no other home to go to.
Also, never allowed us to view the flat prior to booking but promised it was EXACTLY like the video they sent us ( complete lie ).
DO NOT LIVE IN THIS ACCOMMODATION IT WAS THE WORST EXPERIENCE I HAVE EVER ENCOUNTERED.

Edit: No I will not be contacting the office to only be left on delivered again. I tried to speak to you in person about my issues respectfully numerous times and never was respected back. Maybe go through your emails and give people back their deposits? You are an awful service and I  truly would never want to communicate with you again, as it always felt like talking to myself.
reviews.reply_text: Hello, can I please request you contact the office regarding your feedback as we would like to discuss this in more detail and see exactly where these issues arouse. There is never a better time for us to learn from past mistakes and we would love for you to give us that opportunity here. Please contact me direct via email at Alex@Mezzino.co.uk. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

reviews.text:
Pros: ideal location, with Sainsburys opposite and many bus stops nearby.
-Some new staff joined near the end of my tenancy, which may lead to improvements. (Alex was helpful)

Cons: Move-in wasn't good at all. Numerous issues such as bathroom light not working (bathroom didn't have a window so this was a problem). Bedroom light and bathroom extractor fan also broken.  Hob extractor hood was held in place by two 15mm screws underneath it, which were barely hammered into the adjacent wooden cupboard. As a result, the extractor fell out of place and was extremely close to taking my mum's head off, who was helping me move in.
- Maintenance team were unreliable. Issues would either be fixed in 24 hours or it would take around 4-6 weeks to hear back from them. These problems from the move-in were not fully resolved until some time had elapsed.
- Building was shoddy and tired upon move-in, and external construction work was ongoing throughout most of the year.
- Maintenance were conducting checks on every flats radiators, and left mine on after they had finished. As a result, the radiator was left on at a high temperature for around a day or two as both me and my flatmate were not at home. This is annoying, especially when you are the one paying the electricity bill.
- Maintenance entered my flatmates room and fixed his lightbulb while he was asleep. He went to bed and woke up with a new ceiling light which was a bit strange.
- Wasn't able to get an in-person viewing before renting the flat, despite months of trying. I Wouldn't have moved in if I had to got to experience this place beforehand

Overall, I wouldn't recommend this accommodation. You would be better off renting a privately owned flat/house, rather than using Mezzino. This accommodation is worn down and has many issues - Mezzino decide not to address these issues and just let a load of students put up with these problems.
reviews.reply_text:
Hi Ben, Thank you for your review your feedback is very useful to use as it helps us to make further improvements to our service and our properties. 

As you have mentioned we have a new team in place, including new management and new members of our facilities team. The team at Mezzino Manchester have already made several changes to the way we operate and the way in which maintenance requests are carried out.
This year we have been holding open events to allow all new tenants the opportunity to see their new apartment before moving in. We have also been hosting private viewings for anyone unable to attend an open day. I note that you say in your review you was unable to do this before you moved in and I am sorry this was the case, but as I say this is one improvement we have made since January 2024. In addition we are currently running at a response time of maximum 48 hours for all non emergency maintenance requests and maximum 12 hours for all emergency requests. On average we are now able to deal with maintenance requests the same day they are reported to us. This is down to the amazing work our team at Mezzino Manchester have been doing over the last few months on site. 

As for the building itself, I note that you have stated the building is tired. Whilst the property is around 25 years old we are currently going through a summer process of replenishing the apartments and improving where possible to make sure all our apartments offer value for money and give all our tenants a comfortable living experience whilst with us here at Mezzino Manchester. 

Again, I am sorry you have had the expeirnece you had had whilst staying with us and I can assure you we are and will continue to do everything we can to make our service better and offer the best possible service to all our tenants here at Mezzino Manchester. 

If you would like to discuss your feedback further please feel free to email me at Alex@Mezzino.co.uk.

reviews.text: I sincerely had a beautiful experience at Mayfair Court from start to finish, despite my specific preferences regarding my accommodation! The management consistently prioritised my satisfaction, and nothing beats an intentional team, really. I found the open-door policy, efficient maintenance and communication system particularly commendable. I highly recommend Mayfair Court to any student seeking a comfortable home while studying!
reviews.reply_text: Thank you Tayo for your lovely review!

reviews.text: AVOID THIS PLACE. Rooms don't look anything like the pictures, and on moving in day you'll most likely receive broken/damaged furniture and a dirty room. This was the case with myself and almost every other tenant I spoke to. I've seen recent google reviews where Mezzino have responded trying to justify any complaints. I'd be wary of their responses as they've recently been advertising an Open Day for this accom on Facebook. It seems they are trying to paint a false picture that they care about complaints to try to encourage prospective tenants to book a room with them. However there are poor reviews from a year before making the same complaints, so if Mezzino genuinely took these issues seriously, they wouldn't still be receiving these same criticisms a year later from new tenants. Do not make the same mistake we did, there are better accommodations that are lower priced and actually look like their pictures. Looking forward to see what dishonest response I receive from Mezzino regarding this.
reviews.reply_text:
Hi Tom,

Due to changes in management staff at our Manchester sites in the last 6 months, our daily operations have improved drastically, and we are hoping to improve further in as many areas as possible. Therefore, the feedback of you and your fellow residents is always taken on board wherever possible to aid us in bettering ourselves. We offer an open door policy, as such you are more than welcome to pop into the accommodation office at any time during business hours to talk to a member of the team about any issues you may have surrounding your tenancy and/or the apartment you stay in. 

We hope you are well!
Mezzino Manchester Team

reviews.text: Generally tired and shabby accommodation  heavily over-priced with poor responses to maintenance requests. Recommend  avoid this accommodation. It is not Manchester Met Uni certified and were it to be so they could exercise some input over the excessive rents.
reviews.reply_text:
Hi Mr Brookes,

Thank you for your feedback.

We assure you that all of our rental costs are in line with the market for alike properties and all facilities issues logged in the correct manner are reviewed and addressed as quickly as possible.

Our records show that the tenant you have written the review on behalf of has rebooked with us for the following academic year at Chancellor's Court and as such we ask that you email us on manchester@mezzino.co.uk if you have any concerns or issues you wish to discuss.

Many thanks,
Mezzino Manchester

reviews.text:
Accommodation - move in day was such a disappointment. What should have been a happy day was the complete opposite. It was nothing like the photos on the website for sure. Damaged blinds and furniture. Mouse in the house trap, also silver finish. List was endless. Overall 1 star

Communication - to start with was very poor, but one day Alex answered the phone and from then on we got sorted with all of the obstacles we faced. He kept me in the loop on everything. Went out of his way to get answers we needed with a re-let. Hes a credit to their team. Overall 5 stars (all Alex!)
reviews.reply_text:
Hi Kelly,

We sincerely apologise for any issues your daughter faced when moving into Chancellors Court. 

Unfortunately, the summer operations period does not always run so smoothly as we have a 2-week period between tenancies to ensure everything is ready for our new residents. We rely heavily on suppliers and 3rd party contractors to deliver on time, and this can make it rather difficult to resolve all issues prior to our check in day if we get let down.

We strive to improve in all areas required to ensure tenant satisfaction, as such your feedback is much appreciated and will be taken on board by the team.

Best wishes,
Mezzino Manchester

reviews.text: The worst accomodation I have ever seen in my life. The worst management team. Firstly, the night before our check in the manager of the accommodation send an email saying they still haven’t cleaned the place and we should expect broken and damaged utilities, and they will all be fixed and cleaned within a week. My flatmates and I checked into a total MESS. We couldn’t stay the nights for the first week until WE cleaned the house. It’s been a month now and still we haven’t seen any cleaners, deep cleaning the house, and NO MAINTENANCE, and I must mention the list of broken stuff is LONG.
Rooms look NOTHING like the pictures, they are scamming everyone
Nice nd busy environment 👏

I never write bad reviews usually but me and my flat mate have had a terrible experience the entirety of our year at Mayfair Court. Firstly, as soon as we moved in we quickly discovered a mouse infestation that has still not been sorted or even bothered with after numerous complaints and maintenance requests. The staff use the same excuse every time and nothing actually gets sorted. Me and my flat mate have had to spend half of our time at home because the mice started coming into our bedrooms which is completely unhygienic and unacceptable.The flats themselves are dark and dingy, nothing like the show flats we were initially shown. I honestly would avoid this place at all costs it is over priced and they think that they can get away with it because we are students. Please avoid.

The WORST place I’ve lived throughout my 3 years at university and the first year was pretty hard to top. I currently live at Mayfair Court and from the day I moved in it was full of red flags. The first being the pictures online look absolutely nothing like what you get in person they’re vastly different with the pictures advertising nice looking newly furnished apartments. What you get is a dated, dark, dingy apartment with little space and poor quality furniture and appliances. Secondly, the day I was moving in I requested access to the car park so I could empty my car of all of my belongings and move my stuff in more easily, to be told absolutely not it’s against company policy and there is not a chance I would be given any access for any period of time without paying the monthly amount for a parking space, (which isn’t actually needed by the way as there is street parking, which they obviously fail to mention before you pay for the car park). Thirdly, there are a number of problems we have had since moving in in September that have still to this day not been fixed, the shower being one of them, lifting floors, lights not working, the fridge breaking (all of our food going off, but they wouldn’t reimburse any of our costs as they ‘gave us a fridge within 24 hours’ which was actually out of their staff room and contained other peoples food), last night our electricity shut off as the toaster tripped the fuse, to which we couldn’t turn back on as the fuse box is locked in a cupboard in the apartment that we do not have access to meaning we had to call out of hours staff due to the office being shut which were unhelpful and clueless. All of these problems stated above have been reported to maintenance on the online portal which states all of these jobs have been ‘completed’ when no one has ever been to fix any of them and we have had them since sepetember. The members of staff are rude, have a cocky attitude, are reluctant to help anyone, give the same excuses everytime an issue is addressed  ‘it’s company policy’. Their own members of staff are leaving positive reviews to make it appear as a nice place to live, which couldn’t be further from the truth, the bedroom doors do not lock so unless you know and trust your flat mate, you could have some issues there. AVOID THIS COMPANY AT ALL COSTS, the room rates are extortionate for what you get and the hassle of living with multiple problems for them to not be fixed for months does not amount to the price you pay and the rude attitude you get when reporting problems. WASTE OF MONEY, NOT STUDENT FRIENDLY, POOR QUALITY, RUDE MEMBERS OF STAFF, I’d give 0 stars if I could.

My son and his friend have lived at Mayfair Court since September. Anyone thinking of student accommodation in Manchester should have a good look at this place.

I have experience in student accommodation all over the UK (I have a commercial carpet cleaning business and have cleaned carpets in thousands of halls etc). I can honestly say this is head and shoulders above the standard halls.

Student accommodation is usually very grubby but this works as it is 1, 2 or max 3 people per flat. It is clean and tidy in common areas.

Jordan and Ian are very approachable and if you want to ask any questions before you move in just ring them (I must have rung about 20 times with questions before letting my son move in).

Wetherspoons downstairs is full of students.

Worst student accommodation in Manchester. Dirty flat, broken tiles in the bathroom, dirty mattress, broken bathtub, shower not working, power going out...Do not book! I've also heard that they can be problematic about deposits so I will be giving an update once I move out (sadly I paid in advance, so I cannot back out now).
Ok

We were one of a few chuffed Mom & Dad's we met on the day who had come along with their son's & daughters to help them move in, but me and the wife quickly realized that along with us there were others who were about to get a kick in the teeth. Soon became apparent that others had rooms that were far from complete and in a wrecked dirty state. Initially we thought it was just us. Basically told 'lump it, your on a long list, deal with it'. All the hard work we seen them do all summer worrying about saving for the deposits looking forward makes it even more despicable when they turned up to a hovel

PLEASE READ..... For start offs isn't it a conflict of interest when the people working there are leaving reviews?. Where oh where is a '0' star button when you need one.!!!!!? Somebody should report these lot to trading standards SERIOUSLY. We just moved in our friend & just felt we had to share what we experienced on the moving in day & since. They had damaged furniture & a REALLY BAD grubby flat needs loads doing & their paying for the privilege!!. They have fobbed off from day one - not cool having your friend in tears on the phone & there's nothing you can do 😠 . This place really DO NOT CARE. Some flats looked okay as we got chatting to some of the others who moved in, but some looked like trap houses!!. After what we saw I would AVOID this place spend your money elsewhere.
They need to fix some of the automatic locks

This place is secure student accommodation  and their is parking available outside. However if your looking for somewhere then this place may not be for you. Internally there is laminate flooring everywhere and anyone walking on your floor or above will disturb/annoy you
Amazing student accommodation in an amazing area
Working on the building quite.modern and very very busy

Great place to live as a postgrad student, I've lived here for the second and third year of my PhD and have renewed for my last year. Staff are very accommodating and the parcel collection system is great. The car parking is very secure and very reasonably priced.

Sainsburys is just across the road and the bus stop is just on the door step.

I've lived at Mayfair Court for 2 years now. Great accommodation in a great location and would recommend to anyone who is looking to live here. Staff are very friendly and attentive - whenever there are any issues it is sorted promptly. It really has been the perfect accommodation whilst studying at University.
Nice student accommodations.
Great accommodation, perfect for students studying in Manchester! The staff are really friendly and helpful!
Great accommodation. I've lived at Mayfair for 2 years and would highly recommend. Perfect location and very convenient for students. Staff are friendly and attentive also.

Excellent accommodation! The rooms are spacious and have a nice modern feel to them. The staff is amiable and helpful. It is also situated in a convenient location, close to all local amenities. I would highly recommend it.

It's a great student accommodation to live in as it's got great security, supermarkets and take-aways nearby and easy bus access downstairs that takes you to University and town centre. A diverse number of students choose to come here as it's one of the safest private accommodations in fallowfield and has a great staff and RC team. All rooms are well designed and spacious, with great bathrooms and ensuites. I highly recommend moving here.

It's been a perfect accommodation,  right next to the bus stop and Sainsbury's. Maintenance always get issues sorted very quickly and staff always help with any problems or questions you might have. Would definitely stay again if i am a student in Manchester in the future!

(please read!) Don't waste your money, would not recommend, their is way better, cheaper and safer! accommodation in Fallowfield than this. The bedroom doors do not lock! so anyone can walk into your room and the maintenance never gets done! I filled in a maintenance form numerous of times for the same problem and different problems and it never gets resolved. One time I had NO HOT WATER and they didn't resolve it until 4 days later!  The biggest problem I had was when the person I lived with brought back random! strange people who did not live at this accommodation and ruined the living room area and damaged the walls in the apartment and again was not resolved straight away and when I rang the emergency number to complain, no one came to help sort it out. So I had to deal with screaming / shouting / loud noise all night of random people who were vandalising the apartment that I was paying for! and when a global pandemic happens and everyone goes home to be with their families during lockdown and your not even staying in the accommodation, they expect you to still pay for it! not like other accommodations that I know who didn't make their tenants pay rent, who have a heart! Mezzino will take your money! and will not be understanding. You do not get value for money, look elsewhere!
A good variety off flat sizes in a well situated area.
